nodes.title: Victory XP Calculation
nodes.description: Given combat ends with victory, when CalculateVictoryXP() is called, then XP = BonusXPForVictory (100) + BaseXPPerEnemy (50) * number of defeated enemies.

nodes.title: Victory Panel Display
nodes.description: Given victory occurs, then VictoryPanel is activated, VictoryText shows 'Victory! +{xp} XP', and ContinueButton is visible.

nodes.title: Defeat Panel Display
nodes.description: Given defeat occurs (all players dead), then DefeatPanel is activated with defeat message and RestartButton visible (if checkpoint available).

nodes.title: Defeat Orfeo Transition
nodes.description: Given defeat during a sin miniboss encounter (IsSinMinibossEncounter=true), then instead of normal defeat, player transitions to Orfeo Otherworld location after illumination delay.

nodes.title: Defeat Green Chapel Restart
nodes.description: Given defeat at Green Chapel location, then SaveManager.IncrementGreenChapelBodies() is called and the game restarts as NewGame from Malvern.

nodes.title: Death Of Old Age
nodes.description: Given AgingManager.OnDeathOfOldAgeRequested fires, then TriggerDeathOfOldAge shows a special defeat panel with message from GameWorldConstants.DefeatDeathOfOldAgeMessage and 'New Game' button.

nodes.title: Victory Continue To Map
nodes.description: Given victory panel is showing, when Continue button is clicked, then VictoryPanel hides, SaveManager.SaveCheckpoint is called with the encounter location, and map UI is shown.

nodes.title: Final Combat To Field Of Grace
nodes.description: Given victory at Years Pass location (IsFinalCombatLocation=true), when Continue is clicked, then player transitions to Field of Grace instead of normal map return.

nodes.title: On Victory Event
nodes.description: Given victory occurs, then OnVictory event fires for external listeners (audio, analytics, etc.).

nodes.title: On Defeat Event
nodes.description: Given defeat occurs, then OnDefeat event fires for external listeners.

nodes.title: Illumination Before Panel
nodes.description: Given IlluminationManager is assigned, when victory or defeat occurs, then the illumination effect plays first (2.6s for victory, 2.6s for defeat) before the panel is shown.
